_comment: Canonical MEASURED results for OrbitSight (frozen evaluate.py). REAL-TIME deployable config (single model per sensor + coasting, all <40ms CPU) scores 0.692; OFFLINE max (cross-grid ensemble + TTA) scores 0.709. Final DVX levers: grid-256 + hard-negative mining lift Stars3 (0.545->0.651) and DAVIS (0.729->0.753); a coasting Kalman tracker recovers Thuraya3 recall (0.63->0.72, AP 0.469->0.506).

real_time.config: per-sensor: EVK4->g192_ctx, DAVIS+Stars3->g256_hn (grid-256 hard-neg), Thuraya3->g192_ctx + coasting Kalman. All sensors <40ms CPU.

offline.config: router: EVK4->cross-grid ensemble+TTA, DAVIS/DVX->temporal+TTA, Stars3->g256_hn, Thuraya3->coasted
offline.note: max accuracy; cross-grid ensemble+TTA ~211ms -> NOT real-time

dvx_levers.note: grid-256 separates the star field; hard-neg mining suppresses background-star FPs (precision up, recall held); coasting Kalman recovers dim sub-threshold windows (recall 0.63->0.72).

latency_note: Deployed real-time config: single model per sensor (g192_ctx + g256_hn) + coasting post-processing, CPU streaming (batch=1) -> 15-38 ms/window, all sensors under 40ms. Offline variant (0.709, cross-grid+TTA) is ~211ms.
